# Commission-Calc.com

Free real estate calculator suite — agent commissions, mortgage payments, home affordability, rent vs buy, capital gains, closing costs, rental property analysis, BRRRR, 1031 exchange, FSBO vs agent, and more. Supports USA, Canada, Australia, UK, and Germany.

## About
https://commission-calc.com/

## Calculators — Sellers & Buyers
https://commission-calc.com/
https://commission-calc.com/commission-calculator-2026/
https://commission-calc.com/mortgage-calculator/
https://commission-calc.com/home-affordability-calculator/
https://commission-calc.com/rent-vs-buy-calculator/
https://commission-calc.com/capital-gains-home-sale/
https://commission-calc.com/closing-costs/
https://commission-calc.com/seller-net/
